mano_cua.result_summary: 单击drag handle弹出Action Menu正常(Delete/Duplicate/Turn into/Copy link)，但拖拽排序功能完全不工作：无拖拽视觉反馈、无幽灵元素、无内容块排序，多次尝试不同方向和距离均无效果
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Action Menu works correctly on click, but drag-to-reorder is completely non-functional. No ghost element, no drop indicator, no block reordering despite multiple attempts.
